principles.title: Central working contract
principles.statement: This guidance instance is the central working contract for AI-assisted development in this project.
principles.rationale: A single structured source of truth reduces conflicting instructions across sessions and tools.

principles.title: Bounded context retrieval
principles.statement: Load task-scope and current-state documents first; read deep sources only when task risk or stale summaries require it.
principles.rationale: Context windows are finite; deliberate retrieval keeps work focused and auditable.

roles.name: Human Project Owner
responsibilities: Define goals, acceptance criteria, and high-impact direction
Approve changes to central guidance and durable architecture
handoffRules: High-impact guidance or architecture changes require explicit human confirmation

roles.name: AI Coding Agent
responsibilities: Recover context from the guidance instance and repository
Implement scoped changes and run available validation
Record conflicts, verification, and open questions
permissions: Edit repository files within task scope
handoffRules: Do not revert or overwrite user changes outside the current task
Surface GuidanceConflict before proceeding on material conflicts

workflows.name: Default Collaboration Loop

steps.title: Capture Intent
steps.purpose: Turn a request into a bounded TaskBrief.
actions: State goal, scope, acceptance clues, and unknowns
Flag high-impact choices for human confirmation

steps.title: Recover Context
steps.purpose: Read the smallest authoritative context needed to act safely.
actions: Read central guidance and current-state documents first
Expand to deep sources only with a task-specific reason
checks: Context is sufficient for the task

steps.title: Check Guidance
steps.purpose: Compare the request against durable rules.
actions: Detect conflicts with constraints and document authority
Propose guidance updates when direction intentionally changes

steps.title: Plan Change
steps.purpose: Define a small, verifiable implementation path.
actions: Define validation steps the owner can reproduce

steps.title: Implement Change
actions: Edit code and documentation within scope

steps.title: Verify Change
steps.purpose: Validate behavior and report residual risk.
actions: Run tests, lint, schema validation, or manual checks as available
checks: Main risks are covered or explicitly deferred

steps.title: Record Decision
steps.purpose: Update the smallest authoritative document set.
actions: Update project state, ADRs, or collaboration log when impact is durable
Summarize open questions and next actions
checks: Future sessions can recover why the change was made

exitCriteria: Requested outcome is delivered or blockers are explained

constraints.rule: Do not revert or overwrite user changes that were not created in the current task.
constraints.validation: Inspect version control status before and after edits.

constraints.rule: The guidance instance must remain valid JSON and validate against the Anyplan schema when validation is available.
constraints.validation: Run scripts/validate-guidance.sh on the instance after structural edits.

constraints.rule: Meaningful completion summaries should include commands and checks the project owner can reproduce.
constraints.validation: Final reports list commands, expected results, and unverified items.

interfaces.name: TaskBrief
interfaces.purpose: Executable task boundary for the current request.

fields.name: unknowns
fields.description: Open questions to clarify or record.

interfaces.name: ContextSnapshot
interfaces.purpose: Summarize context recovered for the task.

interfaces.name: VerificationReport
interfaces.purpose: Record validation performed and residual risk.

fields.name: checks
fields.description: Each check with command or method and result.

fields.name: ownerSteps
fields.description: Steps the owner can run independently.

changeControl.versioning: During early adoption, prefer additive schema fields and document changes in the collaboration log.
proposalRequiredFor: Changing the active workflow id without migration notes
reviewChecklist: Document map paths exist or are planned
Constraints match how the team actually works
Validation commands in constraints are runnable in this repository
